headline: 今日AI速览：学术研究最活跃
narrative:
今日共收录256篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究168篇, 开源项目46篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（60篇）。其中8%的文章有多来源交叉验证。

▸ usestrix /strix：Open-source AI penetration testing tool to find and fix your app’s vulnerabilities.

▸ openai /codex-plugin-cc：Use Codex from Claude Code to review code or delegate tasks.

▸ ChromeDevTools /chrome-devtools-mcp：Chrome DevTools for coding agents

▸ ansible /ansible：Ansible is a radically simple IT automation platform that makes your applications and systems easier

▸ facebook /astryx：An open source design system that's fully customizable and agent ready
text: 今日共收录256篇AI新闻，分类分布：学术研究168篇, 开源项目46篇, 模型发布30篇, 产品/API12篇。热门标签：Agent（60篇）。其中8%的文章有多来源交叉验证。
